description: report a task-DAG's progress against the plan — by redemption, with a milestone roll-up
rules: read-only — never writes to the swarm or the done-ledger
done = a pass entry in the chain-verified done-ledger; the task's own status field is an untrusted hint
validator availability is read from the live chip, so the picture updates as validators get built
usage: Set SWARM_DIR (the dir of P*-T*.json + _swarm_manifest.json). Optional DONE_LEDGER (defaults to SWARM_DIR/done-ledger.json). Output: observe.json with per-task state, counts, next_pullable, and milestones.
limitation: Tracks the structural done-state; it does not re-run the validators (that is redeem's evidence + the validators themselves). A task whose validator is not yet built reads 'blocked:validator'.
